Metadata.SimplifiedName: UWOL - Quest for Money (The Mojon Twins - 2010)
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x080D "UWOLQUESTFORMONEY-080D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "UWOL - Quest for Money (The Mojon Twins - 2010).prg"
